LSE-MS8-L4-13001400-MSSCI8-TTM-API-01 • MS Science Grade 8 • Newton's First and Second Laws

The Wa'a Needs Two

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION: Why do the girl and boy need to paddle together on the same side?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about why they need to paddle together, explain the reasoning the boy gives in the dialogue, and state the conclusion about what the canoe's weight means for how they move it.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NGSS MS-PS2-2  |  MS Science Grade 8: Newton's Laws
